title: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of support services to individuals experiencing intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. Services can include case management; individual and family support plans; access to brokerage services for transportation; in-home supports or residential placement; and employment and vocational services. 606 Medical Parkway Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Individuals with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicant must be an Oregon resident and a U.S. citizen. Hours: Monday 8am-5pm, Tuesday/Wednesday 7am-7pm, Thursday 8am-7pm, Friday 8am-noon, Saturday 9am-1pm (541) 426-4524 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 426-4524 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to request an application for Developmental Disabilities services. An appointment will be scheduled with an eligibility worker who can help you through the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of citizenship, proof of address, and records of any/all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability. AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: By appointment only Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - MENTAL HEALTH AND COUNSELING SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - ASSERTIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS
